description: Freeze a single zero-skew Lean/Mathlib toolchain (Lean v4.26.0, Mathlib 2df2f015..., repl a9a6f5ba...) used identically for extraction, rewriting, verification, and eval - byte-identical to ntp-toolkit's v4.26.0 pin.
motivation: A single frozen stack across all stages is the biggest de-risking rule; any extractor/verifier skew would invalidate the verified-reconstruction claim.
formal_results: Stage 0a complete (2026-05-19): the environment builds and is byte-identical to the ntp-toolkit v4.26.0 Mathlib pin.
results_description: A frozen, skew-free Lean/Mathlib environment on a Modal Volume.
conclusions: The toolchain is pinned with zero extractor/verifier skew, enabling verified reconstruction.
